MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT CACH, LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is off calendar. The Cross-Complaint was dismissed without prejudice on May 5, 2014. Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
